pairing: 3. Goto Menu > Pairing and press OK
connect: 3. Goto Menu > General Settings > KISS TNC > Enable KISS TNC
unpairing: You may also want to remove this device from your VR-N76
under Menu > General Settings > Connection > Paired Devices.

notes: Menu > General Settings > KISS TNC > Enable KISS TNC = checked
fieldNotes: Power cycle VGC between each Bluetooth operation
If power cycling VGC doesn't help, cycle Bluetooth on laptop
